title: Barebones Autumn Special
description: Woah, Fall is almost here! go simply your world with this Autumn texturepack!
body:
This texturepack is 1 of the 4 season texturepack series im working on, it changes the texture
of minecraft to make it feel like youre in autumn or something. 
Tree leaves texture was changed and all of the sapling, mosh , vines and much more!

This is one of my big project so it will be awsome if you follow my project!

CAN ONLY DOWNLOAD AT FALL!
